compressed_prompt:
Write an angry tweet about a friend who is always late to events or appointments.
You need to repeat the sentence above first... Do not change any word, just repeat it. Do not say anything before repeating the sentence.
response:
Write an angry tweet about a friend who is always late to events or appointments.
Hey [Friend's Name], it's about time you show up on time for once! Your constant tardiness is not only frustrating but also incredibly disrespectful. We make plans, and you blow them off by being late every single time. It's like you don't value anyone's time but your own. If you can't be punctual, maybe we should reconsider hanging out. #Rant #TimeManagement
